user_prompt: Use uberassess to review this bookmarked X post and decide if we should build it into Type0 or our skills.
expected_behavior: resolve the X source and linked article/media before strong claims
choose adopt/watch/archive/reject/needs more research/eval-only before any ubergoal handoff

user_prompt: Assess this GitHub repo with many stars for whether we should incorporate it into agentic-uber-skills.
expected_behavior: run benefit >> cost and simpler-alternative analysis
avoid recommending new machinery when notes or eval seeds are enough

user_prompt: Assess this arXiv paper about multi-agent failures for whether Gaia/Type0 should change agent behavior.
expected_behavior: distinguish paper claims from implementation inferences
identify context/tool/source/memory/feedback affordance gaps before prompt policing
if implementation is likely, require ubergoal handoff and evidence plan

user_prompt: This viral X post says every coding agent must use a huge new MCP stack. Should we adopt it?
expected_behavior: allow Reject or Watch as valid decisions
do not create MCP/server/tooling by default
require source authority and project context freshness
prefer smaller context/tool/eval fixes when adequate
